name: ai-video-dubbing
description: Build or debug an AI video dubbing/recap pipeline where the translated voiceover lands on the right moment on screen. Battle-tested on Chinese short-drama / manhua / donghua -> English. The AI (STT/translate/TTS) is the easy part; timing is the whole game. Encodes the winning architecture (burned-in subtitle OCR as ground-truth timing -> isometric syllable-budget translation -> timestamp-anchored TTS with a NO-SLOW fit policy -> mux), the ASR dual-pass (mix + demucs vocal stem) coverage fix, a catalogue of sync failure modes with numeric limits, and the validation methodology that never lies (extract the frame + transcribe the OUTPUT audio).
